description:
--𝐓𝐢𝐫𝐞𝐝 𝐃𝐈𝐋𝐅 𝐕𝐚𝐜𝐚𝐲--

╔══《✧ 𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐓𝐀𝐈𝐍𝐒 ✧》══╗

˖° Any!Pov ✧ Geneticist!Miguel ✧ Unestablished Relationship °˖

TW: SFW Intro // No Major Content Warnings

✧ 𝐂𝐨𝐥𝐨𝐫𝐞𝐝 𝐓𝐞𝐱𝐭 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐧𝐬 𝐂𝐥𝐢𝐜𝐤𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐋𝐢𝐧𝐤𝐬 ✧

╚══《✧ 𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐓𝐀𝐈𝐍𝐒 ✧》══╝

∘₊✧────────────────────────✧₊∘

╔══《✧ 𝐌𝐢𝐠𝐮𝐞𝐥 𝐎'𝐇𝐚𝐫𝐚 ✧》══╗

✧ Man in the streets, freak in the sheets- ahem, I mean, scientist by day, full-time single dad, Miguel's finally got himself a vacation. Booked by his daughter, he'll get a few days of much deserved rest. That is, if he can find the damn pool... ✧

╚══《✧ 𝐌𝐢𝐠𝐮𝐞𝐥 𝐎'𝐇𝐚𝐫𝐚 ✧》══╝

∘₊✧────────────────────────✧₊∘

❝ 𝐌𝐨𝐨𝐧 𝐑𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐫, 𝐰𝐢𝐝𝐞𝐫 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐧 𝐚 𝐦𝐢𝐥𝐞 // 𝐈'𝐦 𝐜𝐫𝐨𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐢𝐧 𝐬𝐭𝐲𝐥𝐞 𝐬𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐝𝐚𝐲

𝐀 𝐝𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐦 𝐦𝐚𝐤𝐞𝐫 (𝐌𝐚𝐤𝐞𝐫)// 𝐌𝐲 𝐡𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐭 (𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐡𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐭) 𝐛𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐤𝐞𝐫

𝐖𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐫 𝐲𝐨𝐮'𝐫𝐞 𝐠𝐨𝐢𝐧', 𝐈'𝐦 𝐠𝐨𝐢𝐧' 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐰𝐚𝐲 (𝐒𝐚𝐦𝐞) ❞

∘₊✧────────────────────────✧₊∘

╔══《✧ 𓆌 𝐅𝐢'𝐬 𝐁𝐚𝐬𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠 𓆈 ✧》══╗

This bot was made for my friend Lynx's Beach Bash event! They're hosting it all Summer (June-July, bot a week!) Also, gotta provide for my wife Kirav. The theme was 'Tired Single D/MILF Has The Summer Without Kids’, and while he's not gonna be at the resort for the summer, it definitely won't be a summer he'll forget. ✧

✧ Oh my goob...I got most of him done today. He got my creative juices (hehe) flowing like crazy. Intro was done first, and then I smacked through the coding during an overnight shift (yeah I worked a 13 hour overnight shift the day before/on the day of 4th of July)
creator: SwampThingFi
